title: realloc Semantics and Transactional Growth · Memory Trace: Realloc Move Aliases
summary: A dynamic event list grows under memory pressure and loses its only pointer when resizing fails. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem realloc move aliases increment in amortized vector with failure invariants. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Invalidate or rebase all interior pointers and aliases when realloc may move storage.
Store realloc results transactionally so allocation failure preserves the original live block.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Realloc Move Aliases · Theory Realloc Move Aliases
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory native-systems team handles memory case 1835. Produce bounded C evidence to grow capacity without losing the old allocation on failure; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Invalidate or rebase all interior pointers and aliases when realloc may move storage.
